subcodes.first_line: O my Lord, my Lord! The flames of yearning have been kindled within the hearts of the people of concord in their longing to attain Thy presence... O resplendent and radiant one, the Lord of all worlds declareth that among the conditions of the love of God is to fall into trials [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ربی ربی قد اتقدت نیران الاشتیاق فی قلوب اهل الوفاق شوقا للقائک… ای زهراء بهراء خداوند عالمیان میفرماید که از شروط محبت الله وقوع در امتحان
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @eulogies; reminiscences, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love of God
